name: Checkbox
description: A binary form input for toggling a boolean value. Supports checked, unchecked, and indeterminate states. Use in forms where multiple independent options can be selected.
instructions: Always pair with a Label component for accessibility — connect them via matching id and htmlFor props, or use aria-labelledby. Use value='indeterminate' for partial selection states (e.g. select-all with mixed children). Use RadioList when only one option from a group can be selected. Use Switch for binary settings that take immediate effect rather than form submission.
